items.title: 4 Takeaways From Spain's World Cup Roster Selection
items.summary: Spain will be one of the most dangerous teams at the World Cup even without any Real Madrid stars on its squad.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England beat New Zealand to win T20 series
items.summary: England win the final game of the women's T20 international series in a dominant display, beating New Zealand by seven wickets to seal a 2-1 series victory.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
